s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent the airbag working.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips and audio amplifier cover.
Disconnect each connector and remove the bolt.
Remove the bolt and stereo component amplifier assembly as shown in the illustration.
